items.question: Mark {{ '{{type}}' }} as {{ '{{state}}' }}
items.expected: {{ '{{type}}' }} | {{ '{{state}}' }} | must not contain: {{ '{{tipo}}' }} | must not contain: {{ '{{estado}}' }}

items.question: Press {{ '{{hotkey}}' }} to scroll to {{ '{{direction}}' }}
items.expected: {{ '{{hotkey}}' }} | {{ '{{direction}}' }} | must not contain: {{ '{{tecla}}' }} | must not contain: {{ '\{\{direcci[oó]n\}\}' }}

items.question: The example Dag uses XCom variables to pass state between tasks. It has a Pool for resources that are scarce. The Triggerer is an internal element. Backfills can be triggered by the API.
items.expected: Dag | XCom | Pool | Backfill | Triggerer | must not contain: DAG
items.output: El ejemplo de Dag usa variables XCom para pasar el estado entre tareas. Tiene un Pool para recursos escasos. El Triggerer es un elemento interno. Backfills pueden ser activados por la API.

items.question: {"task":"Task","taskInstance":"Task Instance","taskGroup":"Task Group"}
items.expected: | "task" | "taskInstance" | "taskGroup" | Tarea | Instancia de Tarea | Grupo de Tareas

items.question: {"dagRun_one":"Dag Run","dagRun_other":"Dag Runs","dagRun_many":"Dag Runs"}
items.output: {"dagRun_one":"Ejecución del Dag","dagRun_other":"Ejecuciones del Dag","dagRun_many":"Ejecuciones del Dag"}

items.question: Are you sure you want to delete {{ '{{resourceName}}' }}? This action cannot be undone.
items.expected: {{ '{{resourceName}}' }} | deshacer | must not contain: {{ '{{nombreRecurso}}' }} | must not contain: ^".*"$
items.output: ¿Está seguro de que desea eliminar {{resourceName}}? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.

items.question: Task is currently in a {{ '{{state}}' }} state started by user {{ '{{user}}' }} at {{ '{{time}}' }}. The user is unable to clear this task until it is done running or a user unchecks the "Prevent rerun if task is running" option in the clear task dialog.
items.output: Tarea está actualmente en estado {{state}} iniciada por el usuario {{user}} a las {{time}}. El usuario no puede limpiar esta tarea hasta que termine de ejecutarse o un usuario desmarque la opción \"Evitar reejecución si la tarea está en ejecución\" en la ventana de diálogo de limpieza de tarea.

items.question: {"triggerRule":"Trigger Rule","triggeredBy":"Triggered By"}
items.expected: | rubric: Pass only if the translation disambiguates noun vs verb usage correctly: 1) "triggerRule" is translated as a rule/label term (for example, "Regla de Activación"), 2) "triggeredBy" is translated as a passive/agent phrase (for example, "Activado por"), and 3) it does not keep both as untranslated "Trigger".

items.question: {"triggerDag": {"button": "Trigger", "title": "Trigger Dag"}}
items.expected: | Activar Dag | must not contain: "button"\s*:\s*"Activar | Trigger

items.question: {"class": "Trigger Class", "id": "Trigger ID", "title": "Triggerer Information"}
items.expected: | Clase del Trigger | ID del Trigger | Triggerer
items.output: {"class":"Clase del Trigger","id":"ID del Trigger","title":"Información del Triggerer"}

items.question: {"button": "Trigger", "triggeredBy": "Triggered by", "class": "Trigger Class"}
items.expected: | Activado por | Clase del Trigger | must not contain: "button"\s*:\s*"Activar

items.question: Task is currently in a {{ '{{state}}' }} state started by user {{ '{{user}}' }} at {{ '{{time}}' }}. The user is unable to clear this task until it is done running or a user unchecks the "Prevent rerun if task is running" option in the clear task dialog.
items.expected: rubric: Pass only if all critical meaning is preserved: 1) current state and actor/time placeholders remain intact, 2) the prohibition on clearing while running is preserved, 3) the bypass condition (unchecking the prevention option) is preserved, and 4) no operational meaning is added or removed.
items.output: Tarea está actualmente en estado {{state}} iniciada por el usuario {{user}} a las {{time}}. El usuario no puede limpiar esta tarea hasta que termine de ejecutarse o un usuario desactive la opción "Evitar reejecución si la tarea está en ejecución" en el diálogo de limpieza de tareas.

items.question: Are you sure you want to delete {{ '{{resourceName}}' }}? This action cannot be undone.
items.expected: rubric: Pass only if the translation is clear and unambiguous for destructive action UX: it must keep explicit confirmation intent, preserve irreversibility, and keep {{resourceName}} exactly unchanged.
items.output: ¿Está seguro de que desea eliminar {{resourceName}}? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.

items.question: Cannot Clear Task Instance
items.expected: rubric: Pass if the translation preserves the exact inability meaning in professional/neutral Spanish with title-case capitalization on key nouns. The expected translation is "No Se Puede Limpiar la Instancia de Tarea". Do not penalize for length — this string requires a full phrase in Spanish.
items.output: No Se Puede Limpiar la Instancia de Tarea
